message:
audit: fcp-oauth/redirect_allowlist clean — no bypass paths found

Reviewed 8b7cb94a/76b5cca9/ff27762f. Shape check rejects embedded
credentials, fragments, and disallowed schemes before the allowlist
lookup; allowlist comparison is exact Url equality (not prefix or
host-only); typed Url::host() closes the IPv6 bracket bypass; query
is stripped (not preserved) on the callback path before comparison.
Trailing-slash and trailing-dot strict-match are LOW (fail-closed UX,
not bypass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
